record.field: Your data request {{ object.name }} has been completed

Dear {{ object.partner_id.name }},

We are writing to confirm that your data subject request {{ object.name }} ({{ object.request_type }}) has been completed.

{% if object.request_type == 'access' or object.request_type == 'portability' %}

Your data export is attached to this message.

{% elif object.request_type == 'erasure' %}

Your personal data has been erased from our systems as requested.

{% endif %}

If you have any questions, please contact our Data Protection Officer.

Kind regards,
{{ object.company_id.name }}

A data breach has been reported and requires immediate attention.

Reference:{{ object.name }}
Discovered:{{ object.date_discovered }}
72-hour DPA deadline:{{ object.date_72h_deadline }}
Severity:{{ object.severity }}
Type:{{ object.breach_type }}

Please log in to Odoo and review this breach immediately.
